# swift-nostr-client

> A modern Swift library for the Nostr protocol. Actor-based concurrency, multi-relay support, NIP-44 encryption, NIP-59 gift wrap, and BIP-39 key derivation. MIT licensed, requires Swift 6.2+.

NostrClient provides a high-level actor-based API for interacting with the Nostr network:

- `NostrClient` actor: relay management, event publishing, subscriptions, fetches, direct messages
- `KeyPair` / `PublicKey` / `EventSigner`: key generation, import (hex/nsec/mnemonic), event signing
- `Event` / `Filter` / `SubscriptionEvent`: NIP-01 data models
- `RelayPool` / `RelayConnection`: multi-relay WebSocket management with auto-reconnect
- `DirectMessage` / `DirectMessageReaction` / `DirectMessageFile` / `DirectMessagePayload` / `DirectMessageBuilder` / `DirectMessageParser`: NIP-17 private DMs, NIP-25 reactions, and kind 15 file messages
- `EncryptedFile`: AES-256-GCM encryption for NIP-17 file messages
- `SealedMessage` / `GiftWrap`: NIP-44 encryption and NIP-59 gift wrap
- `LNURL` / `LNURLPayResponse`: NIP-57 zap LNURL-pay resolution and invoice-request URLs
- `Mnemonic` / `KeyDerivation`: BIP-39 seed phrase and BIP-32 key derivation (NIP-06)

## Supported NIPs

- NIP-01: Basic protocol (events, filters, subscriptions)
- NIP-02: Contact list and petnames
- NIP-03: OpenTimestamps attestations
- NIP-05: DNS-based internet identifiers
- NIP-06: BIP-39 key derivation
- NIP-09: Event deletion
- NIP-10: Reply threading (root/reply markers)
- NIP-11: Relay information document
- NIP-17: Private direct messages (kind 10050 DM relay lists, kind 15 encrypted file messages)
- NIP-18: Reposts
- NIP-19: bech32-encoded entities (npub, nsec, note, nprofile, nevent, naddr)
- NIP-20: Command results (OK)
- NIP-25: Reactions (incl. private DM reactions)
- NIP-40: Expiration timestamp (disappearing messages)
- NIP-42: Client authentication (automatic challenge response, auth-required retry)
- NIP-44: Versioned encryption (v2)
- NIP-57: Lightning Zaps (zap request kind 9734 + LNURL helpers; receipt validation in progress)
- NIP-59: Gift wrap

## Requirements

- Swift 6.2+
- iOS 17.0+ / macOS 14.0+ / tvOS 17.0+ / watchOS 10.0+ / visionOS 1.0+
- MIT License

## Documentation

- [Full documentation for LLMs](https://yysskk.github.io/swift-nostr-client/llms-full.txt): Complete installation, usage, and API reference in a single file
- [Getting Started](https://yysskk.github.io/swift-nostr-client/documentation/nostrclient/gettingstarted): Installation and basic usage
- [Advanced Usage](https://yysskk.github.io/swift-nostr-client/documentation/nostrclient/advancedusage): Encryption, DMs, relay configuration, low-level API

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/yysskk/swift-nostr-client): Source code, issues, contributions
- [API Reference](https://yysskk.github.io/swift-nostr-client/documentation/nostrclient): DocC-generated API documentation
